description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of peep toe  sandal from enroute. Pair them with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.UpperLeather upper with a peep toe Slip on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole grooved on the forefoot and heel patch for absolute grip and tractionSandal  careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
